Interface OpenApi3xOperation

All Superinterfaces:
Node, OpenApiOperation, Operation, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi30Operation, OpenApi31Operation, OpenApi32Operation
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi30OperationImpl, OpenApi31OperationImpl, OpenApi32OperationImpl
public interface OpenApi3xOperation extends OpenApiOperation
